news.title: U.S. payrolls jump more than expected, but the report had several red flags for the economy
news.summary: Nonfarm payrolls were expected to increase by 55,000 in April, according to the Dow Jones consensus. The U.S. economy is expected to grow by 0.3 percent in the first quarter.

news.title: Consumer sentiment falls to fresh record low in May as surging gas prices hit outlook
news.summary: Consumer sentiment hit a new low in the early part of May. Gas prices due to the Iran war sent consumer sentiment to a new high.

news.title: Anthropic's Mythos set off a cybersecurity 'hysteria.' Experts say the threat was already here
news.summary: The arrival of Anthropic's Mythos jolted banks, software giants and governments into reckoning with a new era of cyber attacks. But the threat is already here.

news.title: Marco Rubio says U.S. expects Iran response on peace deal 'today'
news.summary: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio said Friday that the U.S., is expecting a response from Iran on Washington's proposal to end the war.

news.title: Trump threatens EU with ‘much higher’ tariffs if no trade deal signed by new deadline
news.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump said he will give the European Union until July 4 to ratify its trade agreement with the U.S., according to reports.

news.title: BuzzFeed blows past a key debt deadline, raising the specter of bankruptcy
news.summary: The company was granted an extension until May 18 on a $5 million debt payment. The company issued a going-concern warning earlier this year.

news.title: Kevin Warsh will be the richest Fed chair ever. Just how rich — he isn’t saying.
news.summary: The Fed chair nominee has filed 69 pages about his finances that mostly tell you what he won't tell you. The Senate is ready to confirm him anyway.

news.title: These popular retirement communities have years-long waiting lists — but here’s what they’re not telling you
news.summary: What to keep in mind before paying $400,000 to $1 million in entry fees to move into a continuing-care retirement community.

news.title: I’m giving $10,000 to my stepchildren. My wife warned me against gifts of equal value for my nephews. Is that fair?
news.summary: “Our net worth is about $4 million, and we are both 60,” he says. “We’re both 60. That’s a big difference.”

news.title: This new target for the S&P 500 is very nearly Wall Street’s highest. Here are the trades to make.
news.summary: RBC: Earnings and a supportive economic backdrop should help stocks. RBC: Stocks will benefit from a supportive earnings and economic backdrop. The Canadian dollar is up 0.3% to C$1.30.
